creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-02-12 08:37:15 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    emulators            Makefile 
  Added files:
    emulators/desmume    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  DeSmuME is a Nintendo DS emulator.
  
  It supports many homebrew nds rom demos as well as a handful
  of wireless multiboot demo nds roms. It also runs DSLinux,
  the port of Linux to the Nintendo DS
  
  WWW: http://desmume.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/108903
  Submitted by:   Stefan Sperling <stsp at stsp.in-berlin.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.210     +1 -0      ports/emulators/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/emulators/desmume/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/emulators/desmume/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/emulators/desmume/pkg-descr (new)
